version-guard.run: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); case "$branch" in release/v*) ;; *) version=$(cargo pkgid | sed 's/.*[#@]//'); if [ "$version" != "0.0.0" ]; then echo "error: Cargo.toml version must be 0.0.0 on non-release branches (got $version)"; exit 1; fi;; esac

changelog-guard.run: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD); case "$branch" in release/v*) if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -q '^CHANGELOG.md$'; then :; elif git ls-files --error-unmatch CHANGELOG.md 2>/dev/null && ! git diff --name-only -- CHANGELOG.md | grep -q '^CHANGELOG.md$'; then :; else echo "error: CHANGELOG.md must be staged on release branches (run: MISE_TRUSTED_CONFIG_PATHS=. mise exec -- just changelog)"; exit 1; fi;; *) if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -q '^CHANGELOG.md$'; then echo "error: CHANGELOG.md must not be committed on non-release branches"; exit 1; fi;; esac
